headline: Hubbell (HUBB) Stock Trades Up, Here Is Why
summary: Shares of electrical and electronic products company Hubbell (NYSE:HUBB) jumped 1.5% in the afternoon session after the company provided a positive business update at the JPMorgan Industrials Conference, signaling strong momentum carried into the first quarter.
